essays:
```latex
\text{Matrix Multiplication:} \\
[1 \enspace 2] \quad [5 \enspace 6] \quad [19 \enspace 22] \\
[3 \enspace 4] \times [7 \enspace 8] = [43 \enspace 50] \\
\text{Each cell of the result is a row from the first matrix dotted with a} \\
\text{column from the second: } 1*5+2*7=19 \quad 1*6+2*8=22, \quad 3*5+4*7=43, \\
3*6+4*8=50.
```

\text{CONVOLUTIONN (FILTER APLIED TO IMAG PATCH):} \\
[1 \quad 0] \quad [4 \quad 5] \\
[0 \quad -1] * [6 \quad 7] = -3 \\
\text{MULTIPLYING THE FILTER AND PATCH VALUES THAT LINE UP AND ADDING THE} \\
\text{RESULTS GIVES } 1 \ast 4 + 0 \ast 5 + 0 \ast 6 + -1 \ast 7 = -3.

```latex
\begin{verbatim}
DEF MULTIPLICATION_TABLE(N):
    TABLE = []
    FOR I IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
        ROW = []
        FOR J IN RANGE(1, N + 1):
            PRODUCT = I * J
\end{verbatim}
```
